summary: Publication is withheld due to elevated risk in the following domain(s): Transparency, Bias. Overall risk score: 85/100 (threshold: 70/100). 3 high-risk field(s) require remediation before this document can be approved.

fields.reason: Automated decisions can introduce unfair outcomes.

The proposal claims that the AI will "automatically think harder" and produce better answers, and that "advanced AI recognizes which answer is true" without any description of monitoring, versioning, or audit processes. This introduces a specific transparency gap distinct from standard "explainability" or "model updates" fields.
Lack of transparency can undermine trust and accountability.
